sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import '../styles/Events.css'; const Events = () => { return (

Upcoming Events

Join us in our conservation efforts and community activities

Featured Events

25 Apr

Wildlife Conservation Workshop

Join our experts for a hands-on workshop about wildlife conservation techniques.

Location: Nairobi, Kenya

Time: 9:00 AM - 4:00 PM

15 May

Community Cleanup Day

Help clean up local habitats and learn about environmental conservation.

Location: Victoria Falls, Zimbabwe

Time: 8:00 AM - 2:00 PM

Past Events

Wildlife Photography Exhibition

March 2024

Showcasing stunning wildlife photography from across Africa.

Conservation Conference

February 2024

International conference on wildlife conservation strategies.

Youth Education Program

January 2024

Educational program for young conservationists.

); }; export default Events;
